# Server Configuration
# Set a fixed port for the web service (default Spring Boot port is 8080)
server.port=8080

# Spring Boot Actuator Configuration
# Expose health and info endpoints (more secure than exposing all endpoints with *)
# For development/testing, you can use * but for production, specify only needed endpoints
management.endpoints.web.exposure.include=health,info

# Enable detailed health information
# Options: never, when-authorized, always
management.endpoint.health.show-details=always

# Ensure health endpoint is enabled
management.endpoint.health.enabled=true

# Optional: Configure management port (uncomment if you want actuator on a different port)
# management.server.port=8081

# Optional: Configure base path for actuator endpoints (default is /actuator)
# management.endpoints.web.base-path=/actuator

# Server Configuration
server.port=8080

# Spring Boot Actuator Configuration
# Enable health endpoint for service monitoring
management.endpoints.web.exposure.include=health,info
management.endpoint.health.enabled=true
management.endpoint.health.show-details=when-authorized

# Health endpoint configuration
management.health.defaults.enabled=true

# Optional: Configure management port (uncomment if you want actuator on different port)
# management.server.port=9090

# Optional: Configure base path for actuator endpoints
management.endpoints.web.base-path=/actuator

gen.generatedCode:
# Server Configuration
server.port=8080

# Spring Boot Actuator Configuration
# Enable health endpoint
management.endpoints.web.exposure.include=health,info
management.endpoint.health.enabled=true
management.endpoint.health.show-details=when-authorized

# Actuator endpoint base path
management.endpoints.web.base-path=/actuator

# Health endpoint configuration
management.health.defaults.enabled=true

# Disable security for actuator endpoints (as per requirement: no security vulnerabilities means proper configuration, not adding security holes)
# Note: In production, you should secure these endpoints appropriately
management.endpoints.web.exposure.include=health,info,metrics

# Application info (optional but useful for monitoring)

fix.generatedCode:
# Application Server Configuration
server.port=8080

# Spring Boot Actuator Configuration
# Expose health and info endpoints (more secure than exposing all endpoints with *)
management.endpoints.web.exposure.include=health,info

# Enable detailed health information
management.endpoint.health.show-details=always

# Optional: Use a different port for management endpoints (recommended for production)
# management.server.port=9090

# Health endpoint configuration
management.health.defaults.enabled=true

# Enable disk space health indicator
management.health.diskspace.enabled=true

# Application Information (optional but useful)
info.app.name=Service Status Monitoring Application
info.app.description=Spring Boot application with system time endpoint
info.app.version=1.0.0
